ai-w4-e1.answer: Trigger NPE in a small program. Paste trace. Ask AI to explain each frame. Fix with null check.
ai-w4-e1.realWorld: String s = null; s.length() — classic first NPE lesson.

ai-w4-e2.answer: Ask why ArrayIndexOutOfBounds happens. Relate to loop condition using array.length incorrectly.
ai-w4-e2.realWorld: for (i=0; i<=arr.length; i++) — should be i < arr.length.

ai-w4-e3.answer: Paste full stack trace. Label: crash site, root cause, your fix line.
ai-w4-e3.realWorld: Reading traces calmly is a skill — practice on homework bugs before on-call.

ai-w4-e4.answer: Find duplicated if/else blocks. Ask AI to extract method. Verify output unchanged.
ai-w4-e4.realWorld: Same validation in add() and update() → validateStudent() once.

ai-w4-e5.answer: Describe inheritance hierarchy. Ask if design fits Liskov. Simplify if subclass breaks parent contract.
ai-w4-e5.realWorld: Square extends Rectangle with setWidth breaking area — classic design smell.

ai-w4-e6.answer: Ask: interface vs abstract class for your scenario. Build tiny example of each.
ai-w4-e6.realWorld: Multiple inheritance of type → interface. Shared base code → abstract class.

ai-w4-e7.answer: Generate JavaDoc for one class. Open in IDE preview. Fix errors.
ai-w4-e7.realWorld: Good JavaDoc shows in IDE hover — teammates read it daily.

ai-w4-e8.answer: SOLID with examples: one principle per day. Single Responsibility first — split a fat class.
ai-w4-e8.realWorld: Interview: name SOLID letters and one Java example each.

ai-w4-e9.answer: List your packages. Ask if structure is clear. Move one misplaced class.
ai-w4-e9.realWorld: model classes in controller package — move to model/ for standard layout.

ai-w4-e10.answer: Full project review: bugs, structure, naming. Fix highest-impact issue before marking done.
ai-w4-e10.realWorld: Portfolio project with one solid README + clean package structure impresses recruiters.
